name: Potato Latkes (Potato Pancakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, peel and grate the raw potatoes.
2. Strain the grated potatoes through a fine mesh sieve to remove excess liquid but do not drain them too dry. Use the juice for soup or sauce if needed. If the juice is retained, add a little more flour for thickening.
3. Grate the onions and mix with the grated potatoes. Add salt and egg, then beat well.
4. Mix the remaining ingredients (flour, matza meal, bread crumbs, baking powder) into the potato mixture and beat until combined.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the batter into hot oil in a deep skillet or pot, ensuring the skillet is deep enough to almost cover the cake.
6. Fry both sides until golden brown.
7. Drain on absorbent paper before serving with applesauce if desired.
